headline: Kroger (KR) Expands Vanderpump Blooms And Brings Vanderpump Home To Stores Nationwide
summary: Kroger (NYSE:KR) is rolling out an expanded Vanderpump Blooms x Bloom Haus collection and the new Vanderpump Home line across its stores nationwide. The launch adds celebrity-backed home and floral products, including scented candles, plant care kits and preserved floral ornaments. In-store offerings will be paired with video styling tutorials to create a more curated and experiential shopping experience. Kroger is bringing Lisa Vanderpump’s branded collections into the spotlight at a time...

headline: Kroger Health, Hy-Vee and Ahold Delhaize USA to Convene Industry Leaders Advancing the Future of Health at Nourishing Change
summary: Kroger Health, (NYSE: KR) Hy-Vee and Ahold Delhaize USA announced they are working together to elevate the Nourishing Change movement, advancing the future of health. Founded by Kroger Health, the initiative brings together leaders from across healthcare, retail, food, pharmacy, policy, technology, academia and community organizations. Ahold Delhaize USA, the parent company of omnichannel grocery brands Food Lion, Giant Food, The GIANT Company, Hannaford and Stop & Shop, will join Kroger Health

headline: How Kroger is leaning on pricing and stores to reset its value proposition
summary: “The objective here is to get to a situation where customers feel comfortable that the price that they’re getting when they shop in a Kroger store … is actually fair and reasonable,” its CEO said.

headline: Kroger Q1 Earnings Call Focuses on Cost, Price and E-Commerce
summary: KR's first-quarter call spotlights a sharper agenda around cost control, price competitiveness, store execution and a more profitable digital model.

headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Find Risky
summary: Wall Street is overwhelmingly bullish on the stocks in this article, with price targets suggesting significant upside potential. However, it’s worth remembering that analysts rarely issue sell ratings, partly because their firms often seek other business from the same companies they cover.

headline: Kroger stock slide reveals bigger grocery problem
summary: A strong retail sales report can make the American consumer's wallet look more powerful than many shoppers feel.
